summary: This document is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) detailing the deployment, installation, and integration processes for the company's medical device software. It outlines infrastructure qualification requirements, mandates signed sales contracts before installation, and defines monitoring activities to ensure device performance and safety. The procedure emphasizes compliance controls and version management within the Quality Management System.
